command.ucs.about: Ultimate Claiming System is loaded. Claiming features will be added through the UCS roadmap.
command.ucs.claim.denied.claim_too_large: That selection is larger than the per-claim limit (%s chunks).
command.ucs.claim.denied.overlap: That selection overlaps an existing claim at %s.
command.ucs.claim.denied.radius_too_larg: That radius is larger than the configured limit (%s).
command.ucs.claim.denied.save_failed: UCS could not save that claim: %s
command.ucs.claim.denied.too_many_chunks: That claim would exceed your total chunk limit (%s chunks).
command.ucs.claim.denied.too_many_claims: You have reached your active claim limit (%s claims).
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.ambiguous: Chunk %s touches multiple owned claims. Use /claim merge from inside one of them first.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.no_merge_t: No adjacent owned claims can be merged from %s.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.not_adjace: Chunk %s is not adjacent to one of your claims.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.not_owner: You do not own the claim at %s.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.only_chunk: Cannot remove the only chunk in %s. Use an unclaim workflow when it is available.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.would_spli: Removing %s would split the claim. Use /claim split for a deliberate split.
command.ucs.claim.edit.split: Split claim into %s connected claims after removing chunk %s, %s.
command.ucs.claim.service_unavailable: UCS claim storage is not ready yet.
command.ucs.claim.success.radius: Claimed %s chunks around chunk %s, %s in %s as %s.
command.ucs.help.claim_add: /claim add - Add your current chunk to an adjacent claim.
command.ucs.help.claim_merge: /claim merge - Merge adjacent claims you own.
command.ucs.help.claim_radius: /claim <radius> - Claim a square radius around your current chunk.
command.ucs.help.claim_remove: /claim remove - Remove your current chunk when the claim stays connected.
command.ucs.help.claim_split: /claim split - Deliberately split a claim by removing your current chunk.
command.ucs.help.permissions: /ucs permissions - Inspect UCS permission nodes. Requires UCS admin permission.
command.ucs.help.version: /ucs version - Show the loaded UCS version.
command.ucs.permission.denied: You do not have permission to use this UCS action (%s).
ucs.configuration.title: Ultimate Claiming System Config
ucs.configuration.warnAboutEconomyDefaul: Warn About Economy Defaults On First Run
